dict.string: Open Assist uses Apple Events only when you ask it to control another Mac app.
Open Assist uses Accessibility so Computer Use can read app windows and operate UI when you ask it to.
Open Assist uses Screen Recording so Computer Use can see app state and take screenshots when you ask it to.
Open Assist uses the microphone for dictation and realtime voice conversations.
Open Assist can use speech recognition when you choose voice input.
